character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A survivor who discovered and concealed Flint's treasure in a cave, aiding the group to retrieve it.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who assisted in securing the treasure and navigating the island's dangers.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A former pirate involved in the treasure hunt, later aiding the group to secure the treasure.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A captain injured in the cave, overseeing the retrieval of Flint's treasure.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A figure who confronts Silver, expressing anger over his actions.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: A member of the group who participated in the island's operations.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: The first-person narrator involved in the events of the treasure hunt.
